svg.title: ROORQ drop-to-order confirmed user flow
svg.desc: Seven-step vertical flowchart from Instagram drop post to WhatsApp order confirmation, with checkout form as the only data entry step.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through what happens at step 1 — the Instagram drop post for ROORQ')
g.text: User sees drop story or post · taps link in bio

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the ROORQ drop page look like and what does the user see?')
g.text: Lands on site · browses live drop products

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the ROORQ product detail page show the user?')
g.text: Photos · price · condition · taps Buy Now

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Break down every field the user fills in at the ROORQ checkout form step')
sendPrompt('How does the Razorpay UPI payment step work in the ROORQ flow?')
g.text: Opens GPay or PhonePe · approves · ~5 sec

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the order confirmed screen show on ROORQ?')
g.text: Order # · amount paid · pickup or tracking

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the ROORQ WhatsApp order confirmation message say exactly?')
